3AM Ink on Paper, 100x70cm x3, 50x70cm x4 Textile Sheets, plaster, 250x180cm, 2023

3AM" is an evocative artwork that delves into the hidden emotions. and intimate moments that come alive in the eerie stillness of the night. Through a series of ink drawings and a textile sculpture craftad from bed shasts, the artwork captures the vuinerabiity. honesty, and authenticity of people during their most private hours The monochromatic ink drawings exhibit raw and intricate detais, revealing the unguarded expressions and subtle nuances of individuals caught in the nocturnal's embrace.
Fleeting Territory
Ink on Paper, 150x280cm. 150x107cm, 2023

The transformative and powerful nature of psychological play and its potential to unlock new levels of self-exploration and intimacy are the focus of the work. The artist mixes figurative elements with abstract ink patterns to create an overall theme of metamorphosis and power. The viewer is invited to explore the depths of the human psyche through the prism of raw emotions and the potential of this type of play to unlock new levels of self-exploration and intimacy.

projects.title: Visual Diary of my Inner Demons

children.text: Visual Diary of my Inner Demons
Ink on Paper, 24x18cm x 20,2022

With the controversy that it brings, one of the meanings of this year's topic: Kafayi Yemekis to become insane. My work addrasses feelings like isolation, melancholy, loneliness, inner conflict, and alienation, through the medium of drawing. These series of inner-demon portraits are atime capsule diary of a certain moment. referring to a specific state of mind and nner struggle.

These distorted self-images are reflection of the fact that no an can fully understand oneself as well as each other. Through my wrk | want to connect the dots between the duality of fragile and strong: masculine and ferinine; open yet secret; beautiful and disturbing; dynamic and stil: personal and anonymous. P18} JiTNeukoiin
